notes:
As game starts the audio starts playing. I think I can even hear audio from intro video (it has been long time since I seen the game) and after I hit enter I can hear the menu click and the menu music playing. Screen however is black and remains black. Steam overlay works as expected.

I only tested without DXVK, but there is no change.
title: Sniper: Ghost Warrior

notes: Only black screen, intro videos are probably skipped, but it doesn't work with WineD3D or D9VK.
title: Sniper: Ghost Warrior

notes: Intro video does not play and it shows black screen. Pressing SPACE lets skip it. At first I had bottom part of screen visible only. Had to edit file steamapps/compatdata/34830/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/Sniper - Ghost Warrior/out/Settings/Video.scr and set my resolution to my screens native resolution (in my case 3840x2160) and then game runs perfectly. Very smooth, without any glitches. The only thing I could not do, was to limit FPS, or turn on VSync... So I was playing in 150FPS on 60Hz monitor, so it's kind of waste of processing power. But game in general plays very well.
title: Sniper: Ghost Warrior

notes: Still borked for me, only black screen with D9VK or WineD3D.
title: Sniper: Ghost Warrior

notes: On Proton it works out of the box if you use PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% as a launch option (available since Proton 4.11) the game works quite well with D9VK (D3D9 to Vulkan translation). Tested with RADV and the new Mesa ACO compiler on Plasma Wayland.
title: Sniper: Ghost Warrior
